title: croton hircinus
intro: Croton hircinus, also known as hairy croton, is a plant species in the Euphorbiaceae family, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Croton hircinus include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, and soothing skin irritations. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate these health concerns.
